title:
$SPY It's important: 
 
If an Authorized Participant (AP) trade correctly, it's guaranteed profit.   
  
ETF DEMAND IS LOW: The Redemption Process  
   
Discount: The ETF share price drops below the value of its underlying stocks.   
   
Buy: The AP buys the undervalued ETF shares on the open market.  
  
Deliver: The AP delivers these ETF shares back to the ETF issuer.   
   
Swap: The issuer destroys the ETF shares and returns the actual physical stock basket to the AP.   
   
Profit: The AP sells the individual stocks on the open market to pocket the difference.  
 __________ 
 
ETF DEMAND IS HIGH : The Creation Process  
   
Premium: The ETF share price rises above the value of its underlying stocks.   
   
Buy: The AP buys shares of all 500 individual S&P 500 companies on the open market.  
  
Deliver: The AP delivers this exact basket of stocks to the ETF issuer.   
   
Swap: The issuer gives the AP a block of new ETF shares in return.   
   
Profit: The AP sells these new ETF shares at the higher market price for a profit.
reason: ETF의 거래 과정에 대한 기술적 설명이지만 투자 심리는 중립적이다.
